title: Resolution approving and adopting Municipal Development Council (MDC) Resolution No. 2019-05 dated May 23, 2019, entitled ?Resolution appropriating the amount of Four Hundred Eighty-Nine Thousand Two Hundred Ninety Eight Pesos (Php489,298.00) differential of the Twenty Percent (20%) of the 2019 Annual Internal Revenue Allotment (IRA) for development projects for the completion of the Drug Rehabilitation Facility located at Brgy. Timugan, Los Baños, Laguna and further approving the same.?
